description:
Recto is probably a state report in Arabic script. Damaged and very difficult to read. Referring to people fleeing from a battle, al-Shām, Egypt, ʿAsqalān, and potentially al-Afḍal. Verso, probably the original use, is another state document in Arabic script, in a different hand. Needs examination.

This document was identified and catalogued on PGP by Alan Elbaum in 2024. Pending publication by Paul Cobb and Alan Elbaum.
tags: Crusades, Arabic crusades, arabic military report
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
